Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.'S Notice Of Motion An Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay The Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DANIEL AZIZI, Esq. of Downtown L.A. Law Group (Tel: 213-389-3765) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay The Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.'s, also erroneously sued as Social Bicycles, Inc., and Jump (hereinafter "Uber") motion to compel arbitration and to stay this action pending completion of arbitration is granted.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: David Salyer, CSR No. 4410, davesal55@gmail.com, Tel: 323-497-1441 (302/RBU)
